meaning: work hard; do all one can to; strive for/argue strongly
sentence: 他力争在三十岁前拿到博士学位。
pinyin: Tā lìzhēng zài sānshí suì qián ná dào bóshì xuéwèi.
english: He is doing everything he can to get his PhD before turning thirty.

meaning: to join together; to link (especially transport)
sentence: 两段视频的衔接不太自然。
pinyin: Liǎng duàn shìpín de xiánjiē bù tài zìrán.
english: The transition between the two video clips isn't very smooth.

sentence: 这个小区住的大多是富人。
pinyin: Zhège xiǎoqū zhù de dàduō shì fùrén.
english: Most of the residents in this neighborhood are wealthy.

sentence: 这款电视最近降价了不少。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn diànshì zuìjìn jiàngjià le bùshǎo.
english: This TV has dropped quite a bit in price recently.

sentence: 这份报告写得很简洁，一看就懂。
pinyin: Zhè fèn bàogào xiě de hěn jiǎnjié, yī kàn jiù dǒng.
english: This report is written very concisely — you understand it at a glance.
